LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.description: Expends a charge to spray an extended-range incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.label: exterminator flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.description: Expends stored chemfuel to project a longer, hotter incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.label: heavy flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.description: Hurls a mini-nuke in a high arc.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.label: mini-nuke throw
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.description: Expends a chemfuel charge to spray a close-range incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.label: light flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.description: Expends a napalm charge to spray an incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.label: napalm flamer
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronRocketSalvo.label: rocket salvo
